champions.name: Naafiri
champions.title: the Hound of a Hundred Bites

spells.name: Cleanse
spells.description: Removes all disables (excluding suppression and airborne) and summoner spell debuffs affecting your champion and gives Tenacity.

spells.name: Exhaust
spells.description: Slows target enemy champion and reduces their damage dealt.

spells.name: Flash
spells.description: Teleports you a short distance toward your cursor.

spells.name: Ghost
spells.description: Gain Move Speed and ignore unit collision for the duration.

spells.name: Heal
spells.description: Restores Health and grants Move Speed to you and target allied champion.

spells.name: Ignite
spells.description: Deals true damage over time to target enemy champion and reduces healing effects on them for the duration.

spells.name: Smite
spells.description: Deals true damage to a monster or minion.

spells.name: Teleport
spells.description: After a brief channel, become untargetable and travel to an allied unit. Upgrades into Unleashed Teleport, which significantly increases travel speed.

spells.name: Clarity
spells.description: Restores your and ally champion's Mana.

spells.name: Flash
spells.description: Teleports your champion a short distance toward your cursor's location.

spells.name: Flee
spells.description: Gain a short burst of Move Speed, increased while running away from enemy champions.

spells.name: Mark
spells.description: Throw a snowball in a straight line at your enemies. If it hits an enemy, they become marked, granting True Sight, and your champion can quickly travel to the marked target as a follow up.

spells.name: Mark
spells.description: Throw a snowball in a straight line at your enemies. If it hits an enemy, they become marked, granting True Sight, and your champion can quickly travel to the marked target as a follow up.

spells.name: Poro Toss
spells.description: Toss a Poro at your enemies. If it hits, you can quickly travel to your target as a follow up.

spells.name: To the King!
spells.description: Quickly travel to the Poro King's side.

all.name: Crimson Lucidity
all.description: 20 Ability Haste 45 Move Speed Ionian Insight Gain 20 Summoner Spell Haste. Noxian Haste Empowering or protecting allies with abilities, dealing damage to enemy Champions with abilities, or casting a Summoner Spell grants 0 Move Speed for 4 seconds. Noxian Haste can only be triggered once per Ability cast.

all.name: Ionian Boots of Lucidity
all.description: 10 Ability Haste 45 Move Speed Ionian Insight Gain 10 Summoner Spell Haste.

runes.name: Grisly Mementos
runes.description: Collect 1 memento on champion takedowns , up to 18 total. Gain 6 Trinket Haste for each collected. In game modes where vision Trinkets do not exist, instead gain 3 Summoner Spell Haste.

items.name: Crimson Lucidity
items.description: 20 Ability Haste 45 Move Speed Ionian Insight Gain 20 Summoner Spell Haste. Noxian Haste Empowering or protecting allies with abilities, dealing damage to enemy Champions with abilities, or casting a Summoner Spell grants 0 Move Speed for 4 seconds. Noxian Haste can only be triggered once per Ability cast.

items.name: Ionian Boots of Lucidity
items.description: 10 Ability Haste 45 Move Speed Ionian Insight Gain 10 Summoner Spell Haste.

items.name: Ionian Boots of Lucidity
items.description: 40 Ability Haste 45 Move Speed Gain 10 Summoner Spell Haste.
